message: Hi, I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Can you please refund one of the payments?

classification.reason: Customer requesting refund for duplicate charge.

response: I'm sorry to hear about the duplicate charge. To assist you further, could you please provide me with the invoice or reference number for the transaction? This will help us locate the payment and process the refund efficiently. Thank you for bringing this to our attention. Looking forward to resolving this issue for you.

message: Your mobile app keeps crashing when I try to upload a document.
response: I'm sorry to hear about the app crashing during document upload. To assist you better, could you please provide details such as the device you are using, app version, and any error messages you are receiving? This information will help us investigate the issue further. Thank you for your patience.

quality.feedback: Good response, covers necessary details for troubleshooting.

message: Can you explain the difference between your Basic and Pro plans?
response: Certainly! The Basic plan includes X features, while the Pro plan offers Y additional features such as Z. You can find a detailed comparison on our website or feel free to reach out if you have any specific questions. If you'd like to upgrade or need more information, please let me know how I can assist you further.

quality.feedback: Good explanation, could show more empathy.

message: I’m really unhappy with your support. Nobody has replied to my issue for 5 days.
response: I apologize for the delay in response. I understand your frustration and I assure you that we will address your issue promptly. Can you please provide me with more details about your concern so that we can assist you further? Thank you for your patience. Let's work together to resolve this.

quality.feedback: Well-addressed customer complaint with empathy and clarity.

message: My invoice shows a feature I never added. Why am I being billed for it?

classification.reason: Incorrect feature on invoice, questioning billing

response: I apologize for the confusion. To assist you further, could you please provide me with the invoice/order/reference number? This will help me investigate the situation and provide you with a resolution. Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

quality.feedback: Good response, addresses customer's concern and asks for necessary information.

message: The password reset link is not working on Chrome.

classification.reason: Password reset link issue on Chrome browser.

response: I'm sorry to hear about the issue with the password reset link on Chrome. To assist you better, could you please provide more details such as the version of Chrome you are using and any error messages you are seeing? This will help us troubleshoot the issue more effectively. Thank you for your cooperation. Let's start by ensuring you are using the latest version of Chrome and trying the password reset link again.

quality.feedback: Good response, shows empathy and offers helpful troubleshooting steps.

message: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?

classification.reason: Inquiring about discounts for annual billing

response: Thank you for reaching out. We do offer discounts for annual billing. To provide you with more specific information, could you please provide us with your invoice or order number? This will help us assist you better. Thank you for your understanding.

quality.feedback: Good response, request for necessary details.

message: This is the third time I’ve complained about the same issue. Very disappointed.
response: I'm sorry to hear about your repeated issue. I understand your disappointment and frustration. We will investigate this matter further to ensure it is resolved permanently. Please provide any additional details or order numbers that may help us address the issue. Thank you for your patience. Our team will follow up with you shortly.

quality.feedback: Well-addressed customer complaint with empathy and clarity.

message: I cannot connect your software to our CRM. It just throws an unknown error.

classification.reason: Connection issue with CRM, unknown error

response: I'm sorry to hear about the connection issue with our CRM. To assist you better, could you please provide more details such as the device you are using, any specific error messages, and the steps you have already taken to troubleshoot? This will help us identify the issue and provide a solution. Thank you for your cooperation.

quality.feedback: Good response, shows empathy and asks for necessary details.

message: Where can I download my payment receipts from last year?
response: Thank you for reaching out. You can download your payment receipts from last year by logging into your account on our website and navigating to the billing or payment history section. If you need further assistance or cannot locate the receipts, please provide us with your invoice or order number so we can assist you better. Thank you for your patience.
